description_long: This kiosk is a tall, narrow structure with a rectangular tabletop surface supported by four slender legs. The top panel features a yellow background with several large, round black buttons, each labeled with white text, suggesting interactive functionality. The frame appears to be made of dark metal, providing a sturdy and industrial look, while the tabletop is likely a composite or laminate material. The design is minimalistic, with clean lines and no decorative elements, focusing on utility and ease of access. The front panel is clearly intended for user interaction, with the buttons prominently displayed and easily reachable. There are no visible windows, doors, or enclosed spaces, and the structure is open beneath the tabletop.
description: A tall, narrow kiosk with a yellow button panel on top, supported by a dark metal frame. The design is minimalistic and functional, featuring large interactive buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow button panel with labeled black buttons and the open frame beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and the arrangement of buttons on the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, but with the button labels less visible and the open frame structure clear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the button layout on the tabletop.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign integrated into the tabletop, with black circular buttons labeled with white text.
attribute_roof_design: Flat tabletop surface, no overhangs or decorative elements, likely laminate or composite material.
